ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the hospital's address */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County where the hospital is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the hospital */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the hospital's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the hospital's location */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Hospital website URL */,
  "number_of_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available in the hospital */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* List of services offered by the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of the hospital (e.g., Acute Care Hospitals) */,
  "hospital_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership structure of the hospital (e.g., Government, Non-Profit) */,
  "emergency_services" TEXT /* Indicates if the hospital provides emergency services */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospital's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hospital's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_hospital_type FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_type") REFERENCES hospital_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitals_hospital_ownership FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_ownership") REFERENCES hospital_ownerships ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hospital type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership type */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Name of the ownership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ownership type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency service record */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital providing the service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for emergency services */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for emergency services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_services_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, healthcare provider) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital related to the access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital providing the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provided */,
  "service_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the service */,
  "service_category" TEXT /* Category of the service (e.g., medical, surgical) */,
  "service_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the service (e.g., cardiology, orthopedics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_services_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("provider_id")
)
